description_long: This bungalow features a single-story wooden structure with a prominent dark gabled roof and stone foundation. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal timber, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. A covered porch with supporting wooden columns extends from one side, providing a sheltered outdoor space. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a notable grouping on the side facing the porch, allowing ample natural light into the living areas. The roof has multiple intersecting gables, adding architectural interest and depth to the silhouette. The building sits on a circular grassy plot, bordered by a low stone skirt.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a dark gabled roof, stone foundation, and a covered porch, featuring asymmetrical window arrangements and rustic timber cladding.
description_view_0: Front and side of the bungalow with the main entrance, covered porch, and visible stone foundation.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the covered porch area and large grouped windows beneath the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear side of the bungalow showing a long stretch of wall with several windows and the intersecting gable roof.
description_view_3: Back and side view with smaller windows and the continuation of the stone foundation, less architectural detail visible.
